colorVocabulary: Hull Black / Navigation Steel / Signal Red

narrative.scene: A port procurement officer reviewing drydock proposals on a dark monitor, dim quayside office, late afternoon. They scan quickly, read carefully when something earns it. The interface must feel like a technical document prepared by people who have been at sea.
narrative.tone: Quiet competence. No rhetoric. Facts, certifications, named ports. An expert who states their record and lets it speak.
narrative.avoidAt: Any moment where the interface feels like it is trying to impress rather than inform.

componentPreviewNotes.hero: Full-bleed photo, saturate(0.65) brightness(0.22), gradient overlay from primary-deep, bottom fade to background, dot-grid at 40% opacity. Never plain color hero.
componentPreviewNotes.bento: gap-px bg-border grid creates hairline grid separators. Featured cell always bg-primary-deep. Standard cells bg-card.
componentPreviewNotes.stats: text-4xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-foreground. Never text-primary on numbers.
componentPreviewNotes.overline: 10px, uppercase, tracking-[0.35em], text-muted-foreground. Always above section H2.
componentPreviewNotes.cta: Signal Red bg, shadow-red glow, btn-shine + btn-tactile classes. Min 44px touch target.
componentPreviewNotes.tabUnderline: border-b-2 border-brand-red on active. No background fill on tabs.

strictBans: text-primary on headings or stat numbers
dynamic Tailwind class construction via template literals
